title: Comparison of Selection Sort and Bubble Sort Algorithms
description: A flowchart illustrating the key steps and differences in the logic flow of Selection Sort and Bubble Sort algorithms.
relationships: Selection Sort iterates to find the smallest element and swaps it to the front
Bubble Sort repeatedly compares and swaps adjacent elements to push the largest value to the end
Both algorithms produce a Sorted Array Output through iterative passes
Selection Sort reduces the unsorted portion each iteration
Bubble Sort reduces the end boundary each iteration as largest elements 'bubble' up
